title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/01/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued to fluctuate upward. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 782.5 yuan/mt, up0.71% throughout the day. Traders were active in selling, with a strong sentiment to stand firm on quotes.
